name: PureSnap
tagline: Grab pure, watermark-free media from 999+ platforms
description: PureSnap downloads videos, images, and audio without watermarks from 999+ platforms including YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Bilibili, and more. Built-in API key means zero configuration — install and start downloading immediately. Also supports Sora2 watermark removal, subtitle extraction, and batch playlist downloads.
